steps.title: Set up the cost equation
steps.content:
Let $r$ = number of rabbit snails. The total cost equals cost of rabbit snails plus cost of nerite snails:
$$8r + 6(2) = 52$$

steps.title: Solve for r
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$8r + 12 = 52$$
Subtract 12:
$$8r = 40$$
Divide by 8:
$$r = 5$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
